name: cyboflow
description: Cyboflow - Multi-session AI code assistant manager

scripts.electron-dev: concurrently "pnpm run --filter frontend dev" "wait-on http://localhost:4521 && electron . --remote-debugging-port=9223"
scripts.electron-dev:custom: concurrently "pnpm run --filter frontend dev" "wait-on http://localhost:4521 && electron ."
scripts.build: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run build:electron
scripts.build:main: pnpm run --filter main build && node scripts/bundle-mcp-server.mjs
scripts.build:mac: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --universal --publish never --config build/electron-builder.generated.json
scripts.build:mac:universal: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --universal --publish never --config build/electron-builder.generated.json
scripts.build:mac:x64: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && BUILD_ARCH=x64 node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --x64 --publish never --config build/electron-builder.generated.json
scripts.build:mac:arm64: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && BUILD_ARCH=arm64 node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish never --config build/electron-builder.generated.json
scripts.build:mac:ci: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --universal --publish never --config build/electron-builder.generated.json
scripts.release:mac: pnpm run build:mac && pnpm run publish:r2
scripts.release:mac:universal: pnpm run build:mac:universal && pnpm run publish:r2
scripts.build:mac:dev: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && BUILD_VARIANT=dev pnpm run inject-build-info && BUILD_VARIANT=dev node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --universal --publish never --config build/electron-builder.generated.json
scripts.build:mac:dev:arm64: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && BUILD_VARIANT=dev pnpm run inject-build-info && BUILD_VARIANT=dev BUILD_ARCH=arm64 node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish never --config build/electron-builder.generated.json
scripts.build:mac:dev:x64: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && BUILD_VARIANT=dev pnpm run inject-build-info && BUILD_VARIANT=dev BUILD_ARCH=x64 node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --x64 --publish never --config build/electron-builder.generated.json
scripts.release:mac:dev: pnpm run build:mac:dev && BUILD_VARIANT=dev pnpm run publish:r2
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm run electron:rebuild && pnpm run build:main
scripts.test:e2e: sh -c 'while [ "$1" = "--" ]; do shift; done; playwright test "$@"' --
scripts.test:unit: pnpm --filter main test && pnpm --filter frontend test && pnpm run verify:schema && node scripts/__tests__/verify-schema-parity.test.js && pnpm run test:build
